children.text: shall make full use of facility use contracts, leases, and other such commercial contractual instruments as may be appropriate;

shall evaluate, on the basis of efficiency, cost, emergency mobilization requirements, and the goals and purposes of the ARMS Initiative, the procurement of services from the property manager, including maintenance, operation, modification, infrastructure, environmental restoration and remediation, and disposal of ammunition manufacturing assets, and other services; and

children.label: A
children.text: enter into contracts, and provide for subcontracts, for terms up to 25 years, as the Secretary considers appropriate and consistent with the needs of the Department of the Army and the goals and purposes of the ARMS Initiative; and

children.label: B
children.text: use procedures that are authorized to be used under when the contractor or subcontractor is a source specified in law.section 3204(a)(5) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: The improvement, maintenance, protection, repair, and restoration of the facility, the property, or any property within the boundaries of the installation where the facility is located.

children.label: D
children.text: The demilitarization and storage of conventional ammunition.
The authority under paragraph (1) may be exercised without regard to and any other provision of law.section 3302(b) of title 31
